THE_ARCHITECT.talk.GILGAMESHARCHER-GILGA: The King who owns everything, come to climb a tower he did not build. The Spire is not yours, Gilgamesh — but I confess it is curious to watch you spend an entire treasury to learn that.
Pass, then, King of Heroes. Open your Gate as often as you like. My floors are not impressed by gold — only by who is still standing at the top.
Back again, and still calling my tenants mongrels? Recite your wind of creation if it pleases you. The Spire has split and reformed more times than your Ea ever could.
Draw Ea if you must. I have outlasted older kings, richer kings, and every one of them was certain the world already belonged to him.
